# CANDIDATE: BEARISH_REJECTION_VIX_REGIME_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-06-17  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** filter_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

In high VIX environments (VIX>20), the market is more volatile and prone to false breakouts, requiring stricter confluence to avoid losses. In low VIX environments (VIX<15), the market is range-bound and breakouts are more reliable, allowing for looser confluence to capture more entries. This adaptive filter aims to improve edge capture on J anchor days by reducing losses in high VIX loser days and increasing winners in low VIX winner days.

## Mechanism

The gate modifies the confluence_tolerance_dollars parameter of the BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup based on real-time VIX. If VIX > 20, set tolerance to 0.50 dollars; if VIX < 15, set tolerance to 0.20 dollars; otherwise, use the baseline 0.30 dollars. The gate is evaluated at entry time using the VIX value from the same bar.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline  
2. **Sample bias:** 16-month SPY 5m data, all trading days selected; overfit risk high due to adaptive parameter tuning without initial out-of-sample validation  
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward validation pending)  
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J anchor days not yet tested)  
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: misclassified VIX regime could increase losses on loser days or miss winners on winner days; max drawdown could exceed historical max if filter causes consecutive losses; blow-up scenario: excessive risk during volatile regimes if tolerance loosened inappropriately  
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest  

## Pre-merge gate

gym validators, walk-forward validation with OOS/IS Sharpe ratio ≥0.5 in VIX>20 and VIX<15 subsets, real-fills on top 3 J anchor days  

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- untested hypothesis; requires Stage-1 backwalk-forward validation to assess edge impact  

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements existing quality gates (V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE, MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE) by adding VIX-regime adaptive layer; no direct conflicts with leaderboard candidates as it modifies BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON conditionally.
